name: Missing proxy after payment
trigger: i paid but i didn.?t get my proxy
i made payment but no proxy
paid but haven.?t received my proxy
made payment but haven.?t got my proxy
i.?ve paid but haven.?t received anything
my payment went through but no proxy

actions.text: I understand — let me look that up right now. If you have your Flutterwave transaction reference (usually something like TXF-1234), please share it so I can find your order and get your proxy delivered.

notes: This scenario fires when the customer says they paid but didn't receive their proxy. It reassures them and prompts them to share their tx_ref. The LLM then picks up from here — sees the tx_ref in the next message — and calls lookup_order to find and deliver their credentials.
